notes:
NovaPanel v0.7.49

- Relaunched child stability fix.
- Spawn option detached:false -> detached:true gives the relaunched NovaPanel.exe its own process group on Windows.
- Decouples the child from the helper / original-parent process chain so it survives after the original NovaPanel.exe finishes its update-quit.
- Single-character semantic change in updater-helper/index.js. No extract/copy/verify changes.
